headline: Linux Process Management
description: Process management in Linux: `ps aux` (list processes), `top/htop` (interactive monitor), `kill PID` (send signal), `nice/renice` (adjust priority). Each process has PID, PPID (parent), state (Running/Sleeping/Zombie), priority (nice value: -20 highest, 19 lowest). Background: `command &`, `bg/fg` to manage.
